requests.prompt: Raw one-take product ad for Portable LED Lamp. The scene shows a commercial tabletop studio. Use only one adult hand appears as the only moving person or hand. Use the provided start frame as video conditioning; preserve the real product identity already visible in that frame and keep the same product throughout the shot. Begin from the same scene: a compact portable LED lamp, exactly as in the reference, sits centered on a matte dark stone tabletop in a minimalist commercial studio. The background is a softly lit deep charcoal wall; the lamp is switched off and softly rim-lit. The camera holds steady, then starts a very gentle push-in. A single adult hand with a black long sleeve enters from the right edge, delicately gripping the sides of the lamp. The hand lifts the lamp a few centimeters to show its compact size, rotates it slightly to reveal its simple form, and places it back in the original centered spot on the stone. With a light, deliberate touch on the top, the lamp turns on smoothly; a soft, warm amber. Keep the same room and fixed camera for the whole shot, with one main subject, natural motion, and stable hands and product shape. Clean product-ad frame with only the main subject, the real product, natural props, and the visible scene.

image_inputs.description: Video start frame used as first-frame I2V conditioning by the video backend.
Product identity reference for optional start-frame image-edit generation. It is not sent to the video backend as a separate product-reference conditioning image.

creative_design.selected_category_reason: Premium product-hero best elevates a small, design-led electronic like a portable lamp. A restrained tabletop studio, controlled light, and negative space make the lamp feel refined while a single hand action shows scale and portability. A simple warm glow reveal underscores the softness claim without complex mechanics or UI.

candidate_categories.reason: Design-led product benefits from quiet elegance, controlled lighting, and a hero hold. Minimal action and a subtle warm light reveal signal quality and desirability.
candidate_categories.risk: Making the light-on moment obvious enough without overexposing the scene; subtlety can read as too static if not timed well.

candidate_categories.reason: A clear, single action—turning the lamp on to cast a warm light pool—directly proves the claim.
candidate_categories.risk: Can feel utilitarian rather than premium if the set is not refined; requires the light change to be visibly large and warm.

candidate_categories.reason: Close material and form inspection can show compactness and surface quality.
candidate_categories.risk: Too static for 6 seconds and doesn’t easily convey the warm ambience unless the lamp actually turns on, which edges into demo.

creative_design.selling_angle: Design-grade portable lamp you can lift with one hand and enjoy a soft, warm glow anywhere.
creative_design.visual_grammar: premium product-hero tabletop, negative space, controlled commercial lighting, slow hand interaction, gentle camera push-in, warm glow reveal, composed final hold
creative_design.proof_mechanism: A single hand lifts to show compact scale, then a gentle touch activates a visible warm light pool on the matte surface—an immediate, simple proof of softness.
creative_design.hook_or_opening: The lamp sits centered on a matte dark stone tabletop in a minimalist studio, switched off, with subtle rim highlights.
creative_design.action_arc: From a still hero frame, a single hand enters, lifts the lamp briefly to show how compact it is, rotates it slightly, sets it back, then gently taps the top; the lamp turns on, casting a soft warm pool of light as the camera slowly pushes in.
creative_design.payoff: A steady premium hold on the glowing lamp with a calm warm halo on the tabletop and background, the hand withdrawn.
creative_design.feasibility_notes: No tiny button close-ups; the hand’s touch implies activation. One surface, one background, no extra props. Matte stone reduces reflections. The light-on event is a single, obvious warm glow that expands on the tabletop—simple and feasible in one take.

metadata.audio_direction: Calm, minimal ambient bed; subtle hand movement whoosh; a soft chime as the lamp turns on; no voiceover.
metadata.visual_prompt: Begin from the same scene: a compact portable LED lamp, exactly as in the reference, sits centered on a matte dark stone tabletop in a minimalist commercial studio. The background is a softly lit deep charcoal wall; the lamp is switched off and softly rim-lit. The camera holds steady, then starts a very gentle push-in. A single adult hand with a black long sleeve enters from the right edge, delicately gripping the sides of the lamp. The hand lifts the lamp a few centimeters to show its compact size, rotates it slightly to reveal its simple form, and places it back in the original centered spot on the stone. With a light, deliberate touch on the top, the lamp turns on smoothly; a soft, warm amber glow blooms and casts a gentle light pool across the matte stone and a faint warm gradient onto the charcoal background. The hand withdraws out of frame as the camera continues its slow push-in, ending on a composed premium hold of the glowing lamp.

critic_expectation.purpose: Judge whether the raw video is a plausible product demo for Portable LED Lamp.
hard_requirements: single continuous raw video shot with steady one-take continuity

complete direct prompt: Begin from the same scene: a compact portable LED lamp, exactly as in the reference, sits centered on a matte dark stone tabletop in a minimalist commercial studio. The background is a softly lit deep charcoal wall; the lamp is switched off and softly rim-lit..
physically plausible handling of the product by one main subject
soft_context: The shot may hint at this customer context: Harsh, bulky lighting or desk lamps take up space and don’t travel well. People want a gentle, warm light they.
Focus the judgment on the requested product action, proof visibility, and one-take continuity.

Creative design expectation: ad_category=premium; hook=The lamp sits centered on a matte dark stone tabletop in a minimalist studio, switched off, with subtle rim highlights.; proof=A single hand lifts to show compact scale, then a gentle touch activates a visible warm light pool on the matte surface—an.
Expected subject and scene style from asset memory: Only one adult hand appears; neatly groomed nails; neutral skin tone; no jewelry.; Long-sleeve black top with a clean cuff; sleeve edge.
quality_checks: stable face, hands, objects, and camera motion
main product action is visible and easy to understand
visible product appearance stays consistent with the product reference image
ad_category intent is recognizable through the opening, action arc, proof mechanism, and payoff
